name: Pursuit of Knowledge

abilities.name: Crew Ability
abilities.text: Once per game, when this crew selects a scheme at the end of the turn, it may drain three (t) to select any scheme it has not already selected this game, regardless of Next Available Schemes.

abilities.name: Magical Repository
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving a duel this model empowered, this model gains an Adaptable token.

actions.name: The Long Game
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemy models within (t)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Infinite Puzzle
triggers.text: Summon the Puzzle Box, Unsolved within range.

extraction_notes: Crew ability drains three (t) suit icons
The Long Game has an area effect within (t)2" of the Scheme marker
Magical Repository triggers when empowering duels
